scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/api build:types && bun run --filter @app/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/api build:types && (cd apps/web && tsc --noEmit) && tsc -p packages/utils/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/schemas/tsconfig.json --noEmit
